# GitHub Topics / 仓库标签
# 在 GitHub 仓库 Settings → Topics 中添加以下标签，提高项目可发现性

## 推荐 Topics（按优先级排序）

### 核心
```
ai, llm, artificial-intelligence, python, intelligent-agent,
multi-agent-system, knowledge-graph, neural-network
```

### 架构与框架
```
fastapi, pyqt6, desktop-application, microservices-architecture,
enterprise-software, system-design, software-engineering
```

### AI/ML 特性
```
large-language-model, reasoning-engine, memory-system,
wisdom-schools, multi-model-inference, ollama, gemma, llama
```

### 开发工具链
```
ci-cd, docker, pytest, code-quality, open-source-project
```

### 应用场景
```
chatbot, assistant, enterprise-ai, expert-system,
decision-support, nlp, natural-language-processing
```
